Date: | Carrier: | | | | Dock #: | | | | Trailer #: | | | | Seal #: | (Not Required)
| | Check Box if Trailer has 2 "Primary Dock Safety Controls" secured and in place prior to loading/unloading Wheel chocks must also be in place
to prevent trailer movement. | | | | | | |

| Primary Controls: | dock locks, green/red lights, glad hand locks, jack stands, boxcar breaks, trailer is properly supported via dollies and/or other
adequate support mechanisms; and truck engine is not running. | | | | | | | Trailer seal and paperwork match
Trailer seal intact / not broken / free of moisture | | YES | NO | N/A | | Notes for any NO answers | | Trailer / product free of rodent / insect infestation
Trailer free of inappropriate odors | | | | | | |

| Trailer Physical Condition:
Front Wall
Left/Right Sides
Flooring (able to support PIT equipment)
Ceiling/Roof
Inside/Outside doors/Locking Mechanisms
Inside Lighting Shielded and Intact | | | | | | | | Pallets / product / trailer is clean
Product labeled correctly | | | | | | | | Product mixture is compatible / not objectionable
Product / packaging free of damage | | | | | | |

| For Outbound Loads: If NO to any of the above questions, the trailer should be rejected and the customer and carrier notified immediately.                                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |
| For Inbound Loads: If NO to any of the above questions, the customer should be contacted to approve / reject the load. (If a spill issue, Hazmat                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |
| warehouses should not release the trailer.) Carrier should be notified. For food grade, medical or other shipment where required: If seal does not                                                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |

| match paperwork, immediately halt work and notify Manager. For Bonded CFS: If seal does not match paperwork, immediately halt work and notify                                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |
| Manager. Further investigation is required, and a Customs Official must be notified to view the deconsolidation at their discretion. For mold or                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |
| infestation, immediately halt work, notify Manager, shut doors and remove trailer from dock area.                                                                                                           |                                                                                                                                                                                                    |                                                                                                                                                                      |         |     |          |                          |
